---
name: Good First Issue - Maturity report artifact
about: Starter task for Track C
title: "[Good First Issue] Generate a maturity-level report artifact"
labels: [good first issue, enhancement, parity]
assignees: []
---

## Objective

Create a machine-readable maturity report for tools, commands, or features.

## Why This Matters

The spec argues that binary parity claims are too weak. A maturity artifact makes progress visible.

## Suggested Scope

- Define a minimal L0-L4 shape
- Output one report as JSON, Markdown, or CLI text
- Apply the report to a small subset of entries first

## Acceptance Criteria

- A maturity report can be generated
- The report maps entries to maturity levels
- The first output is documented for contributors

## Relevant Spec

- Track C: Adapter Maturity Levels
